risk.desc: Potential for misalignment during assembly due to loose tolerances.
risk.mit: Implement tighter manufacturing tolerances and conduct pre-assembly checks.

risk.desc: Risk of damage to cutaway_window during handling due to its exposed nature.
risk.mit: Add protective covers or guards around the cutaway_window.

risk.desc: Structural integrity concerns if the engine_display_cartridge is not reinforced adequately.
risk.mit: Include stiffeners in the design of the engine_display_cartridge.

risk.desc: Cable management issues if harnesses are not properly routed through the slide_rail.
risk.mit: Ensure proper cable routing through the slide_rail and add strain relief features.

risk.desc: Difficulty in maintaining consistent bolted connections due to variability in parts.
risk.mit: Standardize parts and conduct regular quality checks on bolted connections.

verify.value: All parts and features are traceable from the part_tree to the geometry_ops.

verify.value: Interfaces with adjacent subsystems are reciprocal and clearly defined.
verify.rule: Adjacent subsystem interfaces must be reciprocal, meaning both sides must declare the same joint family with matching connection_type, DOF, clearance, and required_feature.

verify.value: Visible locking evidence is present on critical joints.
verify.rule: Critical joints must have visible locking evidence such as inserts, washers, or preload evidence.

verify.value: Preload evidence is visible on critical joints.
verify.rule: Critical joints must have visible preload evidence such as torque_Nm or preload intent.

risk.desc: Risk of overestimating the mass of the turbopump assembly dummy leading to potential budget overrun.
risk.mit: Regularly review and update the mass estimation based on design changes.

risk.desc: Risk of misalignment during assembly due to lack of clear locating datums.
risk.mit: Ensure all interfaces have clear locating datums and alignment keys.

risk.desc: Risk of improper handling and damage to the dummy during service and inspection.
risk.mit: Provide clear instructions and training on proper handling procedures.

risk.desc: Risk of incorrect mating due to missing keying or labeling on connectors.
risk.mit: Ensure all connectors are properly keyed or labeled to prevent mis-mating.

risk.desc: Risk of inaccurate representation of components leading to educational confusion.
risk.mit: Regularly review and update the displayed components to ensure accuracy.
